pages.title: Daniel L. Myers Portfolio
preview:
I build scalable, responsive, and user-centered interfaces that connect strong visual execution
              with clean engineering. My focus is frontend architecture, component-based development,
              accessibility, and polished interaction design using React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS —
              backed by Python APIs and full-stack workflows that bring real functionality to the UI.

I’m strongest where design, usability, and engineering meet. My work centers on building interfaces
              that are scalable in code, intuitive in use, and polished in execution.

While frontend is my core lane, I bring full-stack awareness through Python, APIs, and data-driven workflows,
              which helps me build UI that is not only visually strong, but connected to real application behavior.

I build responsive, maintainable interfaces with a focus on component systems,
              accessibility, performance, and scalable frontend structure.

I translate product and visual requirements into polished user experiences
              with clean implementation across React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

I connect frontend experiences to backend services through Python APIs,
              structured data workflows, and full-stack integration that supports real products.
“Daniel delivered on time with exceptional polish. The site felt fast, modern, and easy to use.”
“Very professional, responsive, and detail-oriented. The final site was clean and easy for customers to navigate.”
“Communication was clear and consistent. The design direction matched exactly what we wanted, and updates were fast.”

pages.og_description: UI Engineer focused on responsive frontend architecture, reusable UI systems, and full-stack support with Python APIs and data-driven applications.

pages.raw_html:
• Home
  • Work
    • Applications
    • Web Work
  • Resume
  • Testimonials
  • Contact
  • Hire Me
Hello, my name is

Daniel Myers

UI Engineer with Full-Stack Support

I build scalable, responsive, and user-centered interfaces that connect strong visual execution with clean engineering. My focus is frontend architecture, component-based development, accessibility, and polished interaction design using React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS — backed by Python APIs and full-stack workflows that bring real functionality to the UI.

React + TypeScript Design-to-Code Component Systems Python API Support
LinkedIn GitHub Email
Download Resume Explore My Stack
0
Year of
Experience
0
Professional
Certifications
0%
Customer
Success
Positioning

Why UI Engineer

I’m strongest where design, usability, and engineering meet. My work centers on building interfaces that are scalable in code, intuitive in use, and polished in execution.

While frontend is my core lane, I bring full-stack awareness through Python, APIs, and data-driven workflows, which helps me build UI that is not only visually strong, but connected to real application behavior.

Capabilities

Technical Skills & Certifications

Certifications
  • IBM Generative AI Engineering Specialization
  • Generative AI and LLMs: Architecture and Data Preparation
  • Gen AI Foundational Models for NLP & Language Understanding
  • Generative AI Language Modeling with Transformers
  • Generative AI Engineering and Fine-Tuning Transformers
  • Fundamentals of AI Agents Using RAG and LangChain
  • Developing AI Applications with Python and Flask
  • Building Generative AI-Powered Applications with Python
  • Machine Learning with Python
  • Data Analysis with Python
  • Google UX Design Certificate
  • Create High-Fidelity Designs and Prototypes in Figma
  • Introduction to Artificial Intelligence (AI)
  • Introduction to Deep Learning & Neural Networks with Keras
Technical Skills
🎨 UI Engineering Core
React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, responsive layout systems, accessibility, semantic markup, and component-driven frontend development.
🧩 Design Systems & Components
Reusable UI patterns, design-to-code execution, scalable components, interaction consistency, usability improvements, and maintainable frontend structure.
⚙ Frontend + API Integration
Dynamic data rendering, REST API integration, async UI states, form workflows, error handling, and frontend experiences connected to real application logic.
🐍 Backend Support
Python with Flask / FastAPI, SQL, validation, structured data handling, backend integration, and service support for full-stack product delivery.
🚀 Performance & Delivery
Cross-browser debugging, performance tuning, clean production releases, Git workflows, deployment fundamentals, and scalable frontend best practices.
🤝 Product Thinking
Collaborating with designers, stakeholders, and product teams to shape UI direction, improve usability, and turn business requirements into intuitive interfaces.
What I Do

My Services

Frontend Architecture

I build responsive, maintainable interfaces with a focus on component systems, accessibility, performance, and scalable frontend structure.

See Work
Design-to-Code Execution

I translate product and visual requirements into polished user experiences with clean implementation across React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

See Work
Full-Stack Support

I connect frontend experiences to backend services through Python APIs, structured data workflows, and full-stack integration that supports real products.

See Experience
Software Engineering

Featured Applications

Sudoku Server With Coach
A Python-based logic application with guided coaching flows, validation, and structured state handling. Built to demonstrate clean system design, interactive feedback, and user-focused problem solving.
View Project →
Spider-Scraper
A backend automation tool that extracts paginated content and turns it into structured outputs for CMS workflows. Demonstrates pipeline thinking, practical Python development, and product-minded utility building.
View Project →
C++ Chess Engine
A systems-focused engine built around move validation, board-state logic, and object-oriented design. Highlights algorithmic thinking, application architecture, and strong engineering fundamentals.
View Project →
View All Applications
Web Develpoment

Featured Web Work

TRVLSocitey
A responsive marketing experience built for clear user flow, strong visual presentation, and lead conversion. Focused on modern UI execution, mobile responsiveness, and polished delivery in Squarespace.
View Project →
Ciemonioe Inc.
A WordPress business site built to communicate trust, clarity, and ease of navigation. Focused on responsive layout, content structure, and a cleaner customer-facing experience.
View Project →
5 Star Excersions
A travel-focused web experience in development, centered on polished presentation, service clarity, and conversion-minded UI structure within Squarespace.
View Project →
View All Web Work
Resume

Education & UI Engineering Experience

Education
2017 — 2025
Computer Science B.A., Mathematics Minor
Rutgers University — Newark, NJ
2019 — 2024
Additional Coursework / Projects
Full-stack development, algorithms, databases, and automation projects
Jun 2023 — Present
UI Engineer — Big Orange Lab
Led responsive interface implementation, built production-ready UI patterns, improved frontend performance, and supported CMS and API-connected workflows across client-facing digital experiences.
Feb 2021 — Jun 2023
UI Engineer — Rob Brown Consulting Inc.
Owned client-facing UI implementation across responsive web projects, shaping frontend experiences while supporting backend integrations, content workflows, and performance-minded delivery.
Oct 2021 — Dec 2021
Software Development Intern — PruTech Solutions, Inc.
Supported software quality, testing, and maintainability across internal tools, contributing to backend logic, debugging workflows, and clearer user-facing functionality.
Testimonials

What Clients Say

TRVLSociety

“Daniel delivered on time with exceptional polish. The site felt fast, modern, and easy to use.”

Byron Smith
TRVLSociety
Ciemone Inc..

“Very professional, responsive, and detail-oriented. The final site was clean and easy for customers to navigate.”

Ciemone Sheppard
Ciemone Inc.
5 Star Excursions

“Communication was clear and consistent. The design direction matched exactly what we wanted, and updates were fast.”

Client Name
5 Star Excursions
Contact Me

Let’s Work Together

Page made by Daniel Myers. © All rights reserved.
I only use information submitted through this site to respond to your message. I do not sell, rent, or share your personal information.
Privacy Policy Back to top ↑

Dynamic data rendering, REST API integration, async UI states, form workflows, error handling, and frontend experiences connected to real application logic.

Python with Flask / FastAPI, SQL, validation, structured data handling, backend integration, and service support for full-stack product delivery.
🚀 Performance & Delivery
Cross-browser debugging, performance tuning, clean production releases, Git workflows, deployment fundamentals, and scalable frontend best practices.
🤝 Product Thinking
Collaborating with designers, stakeholders, and product teams to shape UI direction, improve usability, and turn business requirements into intuitive interfaces.

pages.title: Privacy Policy | Daniel Myers
preview: This Privacy Policy explains how information is collected and used when you contact Daniel Myers through this website.

If you submit the contact form, you may provide your name, email address, subject, and message content. This site does not
        collect payment information.

Information submitted through the contact form is used only to respond to your inquiry and communicate about potential work.
        I do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information.

Contact form submissions are processed by a third-party form service (Formspree) to deliver messages and store submissions.
        Please review their policies if you have questions about their processing practices.
Messages may be retained for reference and follow-up. If you would like your message removed, you can request deletion by emailingdanielx001@gmail.com.
Reasonable steps are taken to protect your information, but no website transmission or storage method is 100% secure.
This policy may be updated occasionally. Last updated:February 2026.

pages.raw_html:
Legal

Privacy Policy

This Privacy Policy explains how information is collected and used when you contact Daniel Myers through this website.

What information is collected

If you submit the contact form, you may provide your name, email address, subject, and message content. This site does not collect payment information.

How your information is used

Information submitted through the contact form is used only to respond to your inquiry and communicate about potential work. I do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information.

Form processing

Contact form submissions are processed by a third-party form service (Formspree) to deliver messages and store submissions. Please review their policies if you have questions about their processing practices.

Data retention

Messages may be retained for reference and follow-up. If you would like your message removed, you can request deletion by emailing danielx001@gmail.com.

Security

Reasonable steps are taken to protect your information, but no website transmission or storage method is 100% secure.

Updates

This policy may be updated occasionally. Last updated: February 2026.
